name: Adore Me
description: Adore Me is an online clothing brand offering intimates including bras, panties, sleepwear, swimwear, loungewear, and lingerie.

name: Atlas Coffee Club
description: Single-origin coffee from a different country each month with a postcard and brewing tips.

name: BarkBox
description: 2 toys, 2 bags of treats, and a chew for dogs. Each month has a fun theme. Super Chewer upgrade available.

name: Birchbox
description: 5 personalized beauty samples based on your profile. Great for discovering new skincare, haircare, and makeup products.

name: Book of the Month
description: Choose from 5 new hardcover books curated by judges each month. Add-ons available for extra picks.

name: Bookroo
description: Remarkable Books. Charming Deliveries. Lifelong Readers. Bookroo is a subscription for your kids that helps them fall in love with reading by combining the excitement of opening a gift with the discovery of new treasured books.

name: BoxyCharm
description: 5 full-size beauty products worth $175+. Premium and luxe upgrades available.

name: ButcherBox
description: High-quality, grass-fed beef, free-range chicken, heritage pork, and wild-caught seafood delivered frozen.

name: Cate & Chloe VIP
description: Cate & Chloe VIP is a monthly jewelry subscription. Each month you get up to $200 worth of Cate & Chloe jewelry. Subscriptions range from $19.99 for one piece of jewelry, $29.99 for two, and $39.99 for three.

name: CAUSEBOX (Alltrue)
description: Socially conscious lifestyle products from ethical brands. Full-size items worth $200+.

name: Craft Beer Club
description: The Craft Beer Club discovers exceptional craft brews from around the country and delivers them each month direct-to-you or your gift recipient.

name: Crunchyroll Crate
description: Official anime merchandise, collectibles, and exclusives from popular anime series.

name: Curology
description: Curology is a health and wellness subscription that offers personalized skincare formulas prescribed by medical providers.

name: FabFitFun
description: Full-size beauty, fashion, fitness, and wellness products worth over $200. Seasonal curation with customization options.

name: FabFitFun
description: "FabFitFun is a seasonal lifestyle subscription that sends subscribers 6-8 items every season, worth up to $300 in value.

name: Fidget Club
description: Curated fidget toys and sensory items for kids and adults. 5-7 unique fidgets per box.

name: Glamour Jewelry Box
description: Glamour Jewelry Box is an award-winning monthly jewelry subscription service dedicated to helping women discover new jewelry pieces in an affordable and convenient way.

name: HANGSQUAD earrings
description: HANGSQUAD earrings offers a seasonal subscription box (of just earrings!) curated for the season. On-trend earrings shipped directly to your mailbox. Choose from our 5, 10, or 20-pack.

name: HelloFresh
description: Pre-portioned ingredients and easy recipes delivered weekly. Choose from 30+ recipes per week.

name: Home Chef
description: Home Chef is a meal kit subscription service that allows customers to pick out specific meals each week that best fit their tastes and schedules.

name: HUM Nutrition
description: HUM was founded in 2012 by Walter Faulstroh, as a result of his personal struggle with his skin and breakouts.

name: Hunt A Killer
description: Immersive murder mystery experience delivered in episodes. Solve the case over 6 months.

name: Ipsy Glam Bag
description: 5 personalized beauty products in a cute makeup bag. Glam Bag Plus and Glam Bag X upgrades available.

name: IPSY Ultimate
description: IPSY Ultimate (previously known as Icon Box, prior to that IPSY Glam Bag X) is a quarterly, limited edition upgrade available for IPSY base subscribers.

name: KiwiCo
description: STEM and art projects for kids aged 0-16+. Multiple crate lines by age group.

name: KiwiCo Kiwi Crate
description: KiwiCo is a monthly subscription box that inspires kids to see themselves as makers, engineering and creating their own innovative designs and outcomes.

name: Loot Crate
description: Licensed pop culture collectibles, apparel, and accessories themed around movies, games, and comics.

name: Maker Crate by KiwiCo
description: Maker Crate is a monthly craft box dedicated to the discovery of new art and design tools to help turn artistic visions into design realities.

name: MeUndies
description: Ultra-soft underwear in fun limited-edition prints. Choose your style and size each month.

name: Monthly Jewelry Tree
description: "Every month, you will receive a piece of jewelry AND a gift bag and tag to pass it along to a friend if it’s not your style. Be the base of your very own jewelry tree.

name: Nomadik
description: Premium outdoor and adventure gear for hikers, campers, and explorers. Full-size gear items.

name: Once Upon A Book Club

name: OwlCrate
description: OwlCrate is a monthly subscription box for people who love Young Adult literature. Every month they send you a highly anticipated new YA release, as well as 3-5 bookish items (such as fandom jewelry, collectible toys, bookmarks, and more!).

name: Penny + Grace
description: Each month, Penny + Grace subscribers receive 3 delicate jewelry pieces in the metal of their choice: 18k Gold or Silver. All jewelry is 100% Lead and Nickel Free, and subscribers can choose whether or not to include earrings.

name: Scentbird
description: Designer fragrance of your choice in a 30-day supply. 600+ designer brands to choose from.

name: SnackCrate
description: International snacks from a different country each month. 10-15 unique snacks per box.

name: Stitch Fix
description: Personal styling service — 5 hand-picked clothing items per Fix. Pay only for what you keep.

name: The Sill Plant Subscription
description: Live plants delivered monthly with a ceramic planter and care instructions. Pet-friendly options.

name: TheraBox
description: Wellness and self-care products curated by therapists. 8 full-size items per box worth $120+.

name: Trade Coffee
description: Freshly roasted coffee matched to your taste preferences from 55+ top US roasters.

name: Universal Yums
description: Snacks from a different country each month with a booklet featuring trivia and games.

name: Wantable Active Edit
description: "Wantable is a try-before-you-buy online retailer. Personal stylists create one-of-a-kind relationships with customers to fuel their confidence with looks geared to their unique tastes, needs and wants.

name: Wantable Sleep & Body Edit
description: "Wantable is a try-before-you-buy online retailer. Personal stylists create one-of-a-kind relationships with customers to fuel their confidence with looks geared to their unique tastes, needs and wants.

name: Wantable Style Edit
description: Wantable is a personal styling service that sends high-quality clothing and accessories based on a user's style profile after taking a style quiz.

name: We Craft Box

name: Winc
description: 4 bottles of wine matched to your palate profile. Mix of reds, whites, rosés, and sparkling.
